item.title: The case of Vanessa Guillen, age 20
item.description: The story of Vanessa Guillen — a young woman whose case drew national attention and sparked an important conversation about safety, accountability, and justice. Her story deserves to be heard.

media:content.media:title: The case of Vanessa Guillen, age 20
media:content.media:description: The story of Vanessa Guillen — a young woman whose case drew national attention and sparked an important conversation about safety, accountability, and justice. Her story deserves to be heard.

item.title: The Murder of Gabriela De Haro Perez — A Plea Against Gang Violence
item.description: Gabriela De Haro Perez’s tragic death highlights the devastating toll of gang violence. How did her story become a rallying cry for change, and what lessons remain for communities today?

media:content.media:title: The Murder of Gabriela De Haro Perez — A Plea Against Gang Violence
media:content.media:description: Gabriela De Haro Perez’s tragic death highlights the devastating toll of gang violence. How did her story become a rallying cry for change, and what lessons remain for communities today?

item.title: The Case of Four Teenage Girls Murdered Inside a Frozen Yogurt Shop in Texas
item.description: A shocking crime in Austin left four teenage girls dead inside a yogurt shop. Decades later, the case still raises haunting questions about justice, evidence, and who was truly responsible.

media:content.media:title: The Case of Four Teenage Girls Murdered Inside a Frozen Yogurt Shop in Texas
media:content.media:description: A shocking crime in Austin left four teenage girls dead inside a yogurt shop. Decades later, the case still raises haunting questions about justice, evidence, and who was truly responsible.

item.title: Jerry Michael Williams: A Fight Turned Deadly
item.description: What began as a dispute ended in tragedy. What really happened to Jerry Michael Williams, and why does his case remain so disturbing?

item.title: Frozen Yogurt Shop Murders | Four Teenage Girls
item.description: Inside a Texas yogurt shop, four teenage girls were murdered in a crime that shocked the community. What happened that night, and why does the case still haunt investigators?

media:content.media:description: Inside a Texas yogurt shop, four teenage girls were murdered in a crime that shocked the community. What happened that night, and why does the case still haunt investigators?

item.title: Vanessa Guillen: What Happened to the 20‑Year‑Old Soldier
item.description: The disappearance of Vanessa Guillen raised urgent questions about safety within the military. What happened to her, and how did her case spark nationwide outrage?

item.title: Stepfather’s Lies Unravel as Missing Girl Is Found Dead
item.description: A stepfather’s story didn’t add up. How did investigators uncover the lies and find the missing girl’s body?

item.title: She Texted Mom About Creepy Men Following Her, Then Vanished

item.title: Pregnant Teen Targeted for Her Unborn Baby
item.description: A disturbing plot unfolded when a pregnant teen was targeted for her unborn child. What chilling details emerged in this case?
